themes.name: Signature Experiences
themes.description: Discover what makes 'test' unique with these signature experiences that define its essence and identity.

experiences.name: Panoramic Views from Test Tower
experiences.short_description: Experience breathtaking views from the highest viewing platform in Germany.
experiences.long_description: Test Tower offers an unparalleled vantage point over Germany with its top-level viewing platform. As the tallest accessible tower in the country, it provides a unique opportunity to observe the sweeping landscapes and cityscape that unfold beneath you. The tower is equipped with an elevator that ensures easy access to the top, where visitors can enjoy 360-degree views, perfect for photography enthusiasts and those who appreciate stunning panoramas.
experiences.why_worth_it: It's the most iconic elevated viewpoint in Germany, offering unmatched perspectives.
experiences.best_time: 08:00–10:00 or 16:00–18:00 — softer lighting enhances the views
experiences.local_tip: Position yourself over the central glass floor panel on the upper observation deck to watch the high-speed elevator cars ascending and descending continuously in the shaft below, a dynamic display of the tower's core function.
experiences.watch_out_for: Can get crowded during peak tourist seasons; reservations recommended.
experiences.weather_sensitivity: Avoid during foggy or rainy weather — views will be limited.

experiences.name: Scenic Drive Through Test City
experiences.short_description: Enjoy a leisurely drive through Test City, capturing the essence of its picturesque landscape.
experiences.long_description: This scenic drive offers a comprehensive view of Test City's dynamic and varied landscape. As you wind through its streets and open roads, you'll encounter everything from charming old-town architecture to expansive natural vistas. The drive accommodates those who wish to absorb the destination's beauty without extensive walking, making it ideal for families with young children or older adults.
experiences.why_worth_it: Perfect for capturing the essence of Test City's beauty without the need for strenuous effort.
experiences.best_time: 09:00–11:00 or 15:00–17:00 — for optimal lighting and a pleasant drive.
experiences.local_tip: After the fourth hairpin turn on the B42 heading south from Test City, pull into the small gravel cutout next to the old vineyard hut for the iconic framed view of Testenstein Castle's keep through the cypress grove.
experiences.watch_out_for: Traffic can build up during peak hours, plan your drive to overlap with less busy times.
experiences.weather_sensitivity: Better in clear weather for unobstructed views.

experiences.name: Interactive Learning at Test Museum
experiences.short_description: Dive into history and culture at the Test Museum with interactive exhibits suited for all ages.
experiences.long_description: Test Museum is a hub of cultural knowledge and historical treasures, housing a wide array of exhibits that provide insight into the region's past and present. The museum features interactive stations that draw in younger visitors and offer engaging content for all ages, making it a perfect choice for a family outing or a leisurely day of exploration.
experiences.why_worth_it: A deep dive into the historical fabric of Test City, enriched with interactive exhibits.
experiences.best_time: 10:00–14:00 — when special guided tours are usually available.
experiences.local_tip: At the 'Dynamik-Station' on Level 3, pair the blue and yellow circuits on the interactive energy grid to unlock a hidden simulation of 19th-century industrial processes, unavailable through other color combinations.
experiences.watch_out_for: Exhibits can rotate; check online for current highlights before your visit.
